text_block_list.name: Old Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Well, well... So you really did get in. I thought you
were joking about gunning for Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Old Classmate
text_block_list.text: ...That uniform doesn't suit you in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin is stuck in a slump for a while...
